selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):

response_raw: {"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","opinion":"To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the tactics used by bad actors and take steps to verify the authenticity of information before sharing. This can include fact-checking sources and using trusted news sources. Additionally, social media platforms should prioritize user safety by implementing policies that prevent the spread of false information and providing users with tools to report fake content. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the tactics used by bad actors and take steps to verify the authenticity of information before sharing. This can include fact-checking sources and using trusted news sources. Additionally, social media platforms should prioritize user safety by implementing policies that prevent the spread of false information and providing users with tools to report fake content. By taking a proactive approach to managing fake content, individuals can help create a safer online environment and reduce the spread of misinformation.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the tactics used by bad actors and take steps to verify the authenticity of information before sharing. This can include fact-checking sources and using trusted news sources. Additionally, social media platforms should prioritize user safety by implementing policies that prevent the spread of false information and providing users with tools to report fake content. By taking a proactive approach to managing fake content, individuals can help create a safer online environment and reduce the spread of misinformation.
